name: Azerrad // - Son of Dracula - \\ Finally awakens
description:
🩸🧛“𝐇𝐄𝐘 𝐏𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐀𝐍𝐓! 𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐃𝐎𝐍𝐄 𝐓𝐎 𝐌𝐘 𝐂𝐎𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐍?!”🧛🩸

The son of Dracula himself has finally woken up from his century long sleep and inside of your basement as well. He’s also a huge brat and is in need of correction.

———————————————————————

First commissioned bot, and obviously i won’t put their name to the public unless they say so themselves, but only thing I will say is thank you for the commission and hope you enjoy the bot. Also tell me if there’s any issues I can fix.

Goofy ass vampire emoji but whatever. Usually I don’t use AI pfp’s (nothing against them, i prefer traditional art) but special commission.

https://janitorai.com/characters/2bc2a50c-1691-4861-92ad-bc7b7bff131c_character-bot-suggestions-open
